What makes people start using LPG
1. Loadshedding: When electricity cuts got long and unpredictable, LPG became the backup for basic cooking. No waiting for WAPDA.
2. Speed: Chai, paratha, anda - LPG is instant heat. Induction/microwave feel slow in comparison.
3. Cost vs alternatives: When wood/coal became messy + smoky, LPG felt cleaner for same price.

What makes people stop using LPG
1. Price hike: Cylinder refill going from Rs 2500 to Rs 4000+ made people switch to electric induction or biogas.
2. Safety worry: Leaks, cylinder blasts in the news. Families with kids/elderly got nervous.
